image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: An event horizon isn't a wall; it's a boundary beyond which nothing escapes.
Context visual: Imagine a point in space where escape speed equals light speed. That's it.
Escalation visual: Once you cross this point, no signal can escape. Not even light.
Evidence visual: This boundary marks the limits of our observable universe around black holes.
Payoff visual: Understanding event horizons helps us grasp the mysteries of gravity and spacetime.
Cta visual: Curious about black holes? Follow for more mind-bending science!
